title: CJI Surya Kant recuses from Election Commissioner appointments case
description: Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant on Friday recused from hearing a batch of pleas challenging the law governing the appointment and service conditions of the Chief Election Commissioner (CEC) and other Election Commissioners [Dr. Jaya Thakur and ors vs Union of India and ors].A Bench of CJI Kant and Justices Joymalya Bagchi and Vipul M Pancholi was scheduled to hear the case today when the CJI chose to recuse."Should I hear this matter? Somebody may accuse me of conflic
